creator: Alexander Terp
description:
Move the tree-sitter-rad grammar into a grammar/ directory inside the rad repo so that grammar changes and Rad code changes can be made in a single commit.

Key changes:
- Add grammar/ dir containing the full tree-sitter-rad repo contents (grammar.js, src/, bindings/, package.json, etc.)
- Change rts/rts.go import from github.com/amterp/tree-sitter-rad/bindings/go to github.com/amterp/rad/grammar/bindings/go
- Drop github.com/amterp/tree-sitter-rad from go.mod, add gotreesitter as direct dep
- Add CI workflow that mirrors grammar/ to the standalone tree-sitter-rad repo on push to main (paths: grammar/**), auto-bumping minor version and tagging
- tree-sitter-rad repo becomes a read-only mirror for the TreeSitter/NeoVim ecosystem
- Mirror CI needs to maintain its own go.mod (module github.com/amterp/tree-sitter-rad) separately since the files are part of github.com/amterp/rad locally
- Update tree-sitter-rad README to note it is auto-published from amterp/rad
title: Monorepo tree-sitter grammar: move grammar into rad repo
